tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Song: Habits
Artist: Tove Lo
Tabbed by: SoldierOfEdenia
Played with: Capo on 3rd fret



[Intro]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
   Oh oh      Oh oh     Oh oh[/tab]


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]Bm[/ch]
I eat my dinner in my bathtub[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]
Then I go to sex clubs[/tab]
Watching freaky people getting it on
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]
It doesn't make me nervous[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
If anything I'm restless [/tab]
Yeah I've been around and I've seen it all 


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]Bm[/ch]
I get home, I got the munchies[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
Binge on all my Twinkies[/tab]
Throw up in the tub, then I go to sleep
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]Bm[/ch]
And I drank up all my money[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]
Tasted kind of lonely [/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]                              [ch]G[/ch]
You're gone and I got to stay high[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
All the time to keep you off my mind, oooh, oooh[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
High all the time to keep you off my mind, oooh, oooh[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]Bm[/ch]
Spend my days locked in a haze[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]D[/ch]
Trying to forget you babe, I fall back down[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
Gotta stay high all my life to forget I'm missing you, oooh, oooh[/tab]


[Verse 3]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]Bm[/ch]
Pick up daddy's at the playground[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
How I spend my day time[/tab]
Loosen up the frown, make them feel alive
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]
I make it fast and greasy[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]
I know my way too easy[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]                              [ch]G[/ch]
You're gone and I got to stay high[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
All the time to keep you off my mind, oooh, oooh[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
High all the time to keep you off my mind, oooh, oooh[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]Bm[/ch]
Spend my days locked in a haze[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]D[/ch]
Trying to forget you babe, I fall back down[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
Gotta stay high all my life to forget I'm missing you, oooh, oooh[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Staying in my play pretend[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
Where the fun ain't got no end, ohh[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Can't go home alone again[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
Need someone to numb the pain, ohh[/tab]
